scripts.dev:agent-desktop: bun run build:agent-web && bun run --cwd agent/electrobun dev
scripts.build:agent-desktop: bun run build:agent-web && bun run --cwd agent/electrobun build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p agent/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p agent/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p agent/electrobun/tsconfig.json
